calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-16-2021 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-21-2021 Continued To Jan-05-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-18-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. JACQUELINE DEWARR, Esq. of Victor Rane (Tel: 310-388-4849) for plaintiff;
Atty. SCOTT M. MALZAHN, Esq. of Waymaker LLP (Tel: 424-652-7800) for defendant Payward Ventures, Inc. d/b/a Kraken.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT PAYWARD VENTURES, INC. DBA KRAKEN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling with a modification as to false advertising cause of action, as follows:

Defendant Payward Ventures, Inc.'s demurrer to the complaint is sustained without leave to amend as to the negligence cause of action. (Code Civ. Proc. Sec. 430.10(e).)

The demurrer to the false advertising cause of action is sustained with 30 days leave to amend. (Code Civ. Proc. Sec. 430.10(e).)

(See Word minutes for complete ruling.)

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Rose Miller, CSR No. 5041, Email: RMillerCSR@gmail.com. (302/EPS)

Hearing Re: Defendant Payward Ventures, Inc. Dba Kraken's Motion To Compel Arbitration And To Stay All Proceedings.

The matter is argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Defendant Payward Ventures, Inc.'s motion to compel arbitration and stay proceedings is denied. (SEE WORD MINUTES FOR COMPLETE RULING.)

Defendant Payward Ventures, Inc. Dba Kraken Motion - Defendant Payward Ventures, Inc. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And To Stay All Proceedings; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Jun-24-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: Defendant Payward Ventures, Inc. dba Kraken's Motion To Compel Arbitration And To Stay All Proceedings.
